About

Learn about the purpose and destinations of this study tour.

The purpose of this website is to show the highlights of a study tour organized by the Department of Computer Science at City University of Hong Kong. The trip aims to expose students to a different educational system, introduce new collaboration and career opportunities, and expand knowledge of local culture and technology.

Planned visits

Destinations and partners will be listed here once confirmed.

  • Partner universities — details coming soon
  • Industry visits — details coming soon
  • Cultural explorations — details coming soon

The tour will be led by faculty from the Department of Computer Science. See The Visit Team for organisers and participants.

Enjoy exploring our website as we share highlights from the tour.
